description: Keep little hands warm and active this winter with this 3 pack of boys’ magic stretch gripper gloves. Soft, stretchy, and snug, these knitted gloves are designed to fit comfortably while providing warmth and flexibility for everyday activities. Each pair features patterned rubber-style grips on the palms and fingers for a secure hold, making them ideal for cycling, playing football, school runs, or outdoor adventures. Available in two fun designs — football print or camo pattern — these thermal gloves combine practicality with cool style kids will love. Made from a durable 82% Acrylic, 15% Polyester, 3% Elastane blend, they’re easy to care for and machine washable, ready for endless wear all winter long.
